title: hymenophyllum rubellum
intro: Hymenophyllum rubellum, also known as the fern-like Hymenophyllum, is a species of epiphytic fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum rubellum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in the region. In herbal preparations, it is often dried and made into a tea or powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
